summary:
Option C can be excluded because while true for part of the Levator Ani structure, it does not encompass other crucial elements like the puborectalis. Key functional contributions are spread across multiple muscles within the complex group known collectively as Levaor Ani. To accurately describe the entire functionality requires acknowledging more comprehensive involvement beyond just those two mentioned structures.
